posts.author: jpmc-ap (Ashish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Feature Request to allow hiding column at Subitem Level in Widgets as this will help hide the columns showing repetative details for Customized view

What are you trying to achieve

Hide redundant information in widgets added in customized view
